title: A Bloodline Marked for Death
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #3, Shamrock as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don Marlon and the others were killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They were on guard duty last night!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can't be!! Who the hell did this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It only took the perpetrating party a few hours, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The pirates were distraught and shaking with rage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you let this happen?! I'm gonna kick your ass!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the people sank into deep despair, their smiles fading...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...as the world's economy ground to a halt for several weeks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ONE YEAR LATER- GOD VALLEY, WEST BLUE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I always knew you'd come back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why don't you stay here with me???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... if we were to share a home, it certainly wouldn't be here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This island won't be around much longer.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, I've already secured a worthy bride for myself and placed the order.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She will be mine, provided I triumph in the upcoming journey.

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
